title: Dogfood opaque running-agent invariant
goal: Implement a workflow-state health warning for running agents with no credible liveness source.

phases.name: implementation
phases.title: Implementation
phases.goal: Implement and test the opaque running-agent invariant.

jobs.name: opaque-invariant
jobs.prompt: Implement the opaque running-agent invariant. Preserve existing workflow health patterns and add focused tests.

phases.name: review
phases.title: Review
phases.goal: Review the implementation and close any correctness gaps.

jobs.name: review
jobs.prompt: Review the opaque running-agent invariant implementation and tests. Return concrete findings only.
